sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79035" key="paraforti/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραφορτίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n79035.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cram as an additional load into</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ταῦτα τῷ λόγῳ</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.8e</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:139" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.139</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
